prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: HWK-TT-LGLEATHERTB-BROWN
Product Type: TOOL_BELT
Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux
Existing Title: ToolTreaux Heavy Duty 13 Pocket Leather Tool Belt with 2 Steel Hammer Loops, Black Brown
Description: Featuring high quality leather fabrication, easy belt adjustments, convenient hook on storage and extra-large pockets for primary and secondary tool storage, this tool belt is heavy duty and will stand up to all the wear and tear from construction and building sites, carpentry projects, electrical work and much more! Made from oil tanned leather, this heavy duty tool belt is incredibly durable and of high quality; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time. In addition to the ample pocket storage, the tool belt features two steel hammer loops on the outer edges of the large pockets. With space for every tool including deep pockets for nail and screws, a tape measure hanger, pencil holders, hammer loops and more, this large capacity tool belt will give you more than sufficient access to and storage of tools for when you’re on site or taking on personal projects. FEATURES: - 2 Large Pockets 9.5 x 7 inches - 2 Medium Pockets 6 x 4 inches - 2 Small Pockets 5.5 x 3.5 inches - 2 Hammer Holders - 1 Tape Holder - 2 Inch Leather Belt - Reinforced Rivets - 4 pencil holders
Search Terms: tool pouch organization storage woodworking carpentry electrician electrical work leather multitools tape measure bag carpenter jobsite tool box construction accessories men design creative plumbing welding roofing painting supplies framing guys
Features:
- 13 COMPARTMENT TOOL BELT: Featuring high quality leather fabrication, easy belt adjustments, convenient hook on storage and extra large pockets for primary and secondary tool storage, this tool belt is heavy duty and will stand up to all the wear and tear from construction and building sites, carpentry projects, electrical work and more
- HEAVY DUTY LEATHER FABRICATION: Made from oil tanned leather, this heavy duty tool belt is incredibly durable and of high quality; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time
- DUAL STEEL HAMMER LOOPS: In addition to the ample pocket storage, the tool belt features two steel hammer loops on the outer edges of the large pockets, and also one additional leather hammer slot holder if needed at the center of the belt
- ADJUSTABLE BELT: The leather belt features different size adjustments with more room for additional leather punches if needed
- SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Leather; Color: Brown

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Oil Tanned Leather, Dual Steel Hammer Loops, Adjustable, 2 Large Pockets, Tape Measure Holder

openai.title_differentiation: 13 Pocket Storage, 2 Steel Hammer Loops, Oil Tanned Leather, Adjustable Belt, Tape Holder, Pencil Slots, Reinforced Rivets
